name: siteimprove-sitemap-checker
description: CLI tool to audit web accessibility using Siteimprove Alfa against all pages in an XML sitemap

scripts.publish:github: git checkout public && git checkout main -- src/ package.json package-lock.json tsconfig.json README.md .gitignore && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'Sync from main' && git push github public:main && git checkout main
